name: productFeed
supportNotes: Snapshot-mode no-data read support only: captured 2025-01 harry-test-heelo evidence returns null for an absent productFeed id. Live-hybrid feed reads continue to proxy upstream because staged product writes do not currently affect feed membership.

name: productFeeds
supportNotes: Snapshot-mode no-data read support only: captured 2025-01 harry-test-heelo evidence returns an empty ProductFeedConnection with empty nodes/edges and null cursors. Live-hybrid feed reads continue to proxy upstream because staged product writes do not currently affect feed membership.

name: collectionByIdentifier
supportNotes: Supports id and handle identifier branches against effective local collection state. customId currently returns null until collection unique-metafield evidence exists.

name: collectionByHandle
supportNotes: Deprecated Shopify root supported as a handle lookup over effective local collection state.

name: customerPaymentMethod
supportNotes: Seeded/snapshot customer payment method reads serialize from normalized customerPaymentMethods state, including showRevoked filtering, instrument unions, customer links, and payment-method subscription contracts. Formal live overlay support remains false because the 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe still returned ACCESS_DENIED without read_customer_payment_methods; future live capture requires read_customers plus read_customer_payment_methods.

name: orderPaymentStatus
supportNotes: Payment-area scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture unknown-id null behavior; future capture should use safe order/payment status reads and document required order access before local overlay support.

name: paymentCustomization
supportNotes: Snapshot-mode payment customization detail reads are modeled from normalized state. Unknown ids return null; function ownership and error-history selections only replay captured normalized values.

name: paymentCustomizations
supportNotes: Snapshot-mode payment customization catalog reads are modeled from normalized state with empty/no-data connections, cursor pagination, reverse ordering, and captured-safe enabled/function_id/id filters. No lifecycle mutations are supported.

name: paymentTermsTemplates
supportNotes: Payment terms scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture the template catalog; future capture should also record paymentTermsType filtering before local overlay support.

name: shopPayPaymentRequestReceipt
supportNotes: Shop Pay payment request receipt scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture unknown-token null behavior; future capture should avoid creating customer-visible payment requests before local overlay support.

name: shopPayPaymentRequestReceipts
supportNotes: Shop Pay payment request receipt scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture empty connection behavior; future capture should avoid creating customer-visible payment requests before local overlay support.

name: shopifyPaymentsAccount
supportNotes: Snapshot overlay supports the direct root from normalized Shopify Payments account fixtures shared with BusinessEntity.shopifyPaymentsAccount. Safe scalar fields are exposed when captured; payouts, disputes, and balanceTransactions serialize as empty no-data connections until non-empty account activity fixtures exist. Balance, bank account, statement descriptor, payout schedule, and other payment-account-sensitive fields remain explicit unsupported diagnostics. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo capture still returned ACCESS_DENIED without read_shopify_payments/read_shopify_payments_accounts.

name: tenderTransactions
supportNotes: Tender transaction scaffold only. The 2026-04-25 harry-test-heelo probe can capture an empty read-only listing; future capture should preserve payment-details nullability and record no-data connection behavior before local overlay support.

name: event
supportNotes: HAR-323 captured top-level Event no-data behavior. Snapshot mode returns null for absent Event IDs without contacting Shopify; non-empty event hydration remains unsupported.

name: events
supportNotes: HAR-323 captured top-level Event no-data behavior. Snapshot mode returns a Shopify-like empty Event connection with null cursors; non-empty event hydration remains unsupported.

name: eventsCount
supportNotes: HAR-323 captured top-level Event no-data behavior. Snapshot mode returns an exact zero Count for absent local Event state; non-empty event hydration remains unsupported.

name: customerGenerateAccountActivationUrl
supportNotes: Staged locally with a synthetic non-deliverable activation URL. The original raw mutation is retained in the mutation log for commit replay; runtime support does not request a live Shopify activation URL.

name: customerSendAccountInviteEmail
supportNotes: Buffered locally as a staged outbound invite intent. Runtime support validates the customer, updates local account state to invited when applicable, and keeps the original raw mutation for commit-time email delivery.

name: customerPaymentMethodSendUpdateEmail
supportNotes: Buffered locally as a staged payment-method update-email intent. Runtime support validates that the payment method is present in the local customer-payment graph, preserves the original raw mutation for commit-time delivery, and mirrors Shopify's not-found userError for unknown payment methods.

name: productFeedCreate
supportNotes: Registered product merchandising gap only. A 2025-01 harry-test-heelo probe for country US/language EN returned a top-level NOT_FOUND error: Unable to find channel for product feed. Full local support needs channel-backed success evidence and downstream productFeed/productFeeds read-after-write behavior.

name: productFeedDelete
supportNotes: Registered product merchandising gap only. A 2025-01 harry-test-heelo unknown-id probe returned deletedId null plus userErrors field [id], message ProductFeed does not exist. Full support needs delete success evidence and downstream productFeeds removal behavior.

name: productFullSync
supportNotes: Registered product merchandising gap only. A 2025-01 harry-test-heelo unknown-id probe returned id null plus userErrors field [id], message ProductFeed does not exist. Full support needs product-feed job/status success evidence before staging locally.

name: productBundleCreate
supportNotes: Registered product merchandising gap only. A 2025-01 harry-test-heelo empty-components probe returned productBundleOperation null plus userErrors message At least one component is required. Full support needs component-backed success evidence, ProductBundleOperation lifecycle shape, and downstream product reads.

name: productBundleUpdate
supportNotes: Registered product merchandising gap only. A 2025-01 harry-test-heelo unknown-product probe returned productBundleOperation null plus userErrors message Product does not exist. Full support needs bundle update success evidence, ProductBundleOperation lifecycle shape, and downstream product reads.

name: combinedListingUpdate
supportNotes: Registered product merchandising gap only. A 2025-01 harry-test-heelo unknown parent probe returned product null plus userErrors field [parentProductId], code PARENT_PRODUCT_NOT_FOUND, message Product does not exist. Full support needs combined listing relationship success evidence and downstream product option/child visibility.

name: publishablePublish
supportNotes: HAR-177/HAR-163 slices: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product or Collection. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; unsupported Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: publishablePublishToCurrentChannel
supportNotes: HAR-177 product slice: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; non-product Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: publishableUnpublish
supportNotes: HAR-177/HAR-163 slices: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product or Collection. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; unsupported Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: publishableUnpublishToCurrentChannel
supportNotes: HAR-177 product slice: stages generic Publishable mutations locally when the publishable ID is a Product. Product-specific productPublish/productUnpublish remain the deeper product publication parity roots; non-product Publishable targets return local userErrors instead of proxying upstream.

name: shopPolicyUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-173: stages legal policy updates locally by ShopPolicyType, preserves raw mutation requests for commit replay, and overlays downstream shop.shopPolicies reads without proxying supported requests upstream.

name: article
supportNotes: HAR-303: snapshot/local detail reads return staged or hydrated Article records and null for missing IDs; nested blog/comments/count fields are resolved from the local online-store content graph.

name: articleAuthors
supportNotes: HAR-303: derives the author connection from locally staged or hydrated article authors with Shopify-like empty connection behavior.

name: articles
supportNotes: HAR-303: supports snapshot/local Article catalog reads, empty connections, simple id/title/handle/status text filtering, sort/reverse, cursor windows, and staged read-after-write effects.

name: articleTags
supportNotes: HAR-303: derives article tags from the effective local article graph and returns an empty list when no articles carry tags.

name: articleCreate
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Article creation locally, including handle/publication/tag/author fields and optional inline blog creation, with downstream article/blog reads updated and raw mutation preserved for commit replay.

name: articleUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Article updates locally for the supported scalar lifecycle fields and keeps downstream detail/catalog/blog article reads coherent without runtime Shopify writes.

name: articleDelete
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Article tombstones locally so detail reads return null and catalog/blog article reads omit the deleted article.

name: blog
supportNotes: HAR-303: snapshot/local Blog detail reads return staged or hydrated records with nested articles/counts and null for missing IDs.

name: blogs
supportNotes: HAR-303: supports snapshot/local Blog catalog reads, empty connections, simple filtering, sort/reverse, cursor windows, and staged lifecycle visibility.

name: blogsCount
supportNotes: HAR-303: returns an EXACT Count from the effective local blog graph, honoring the same simple query filter as blogs.

name: blogCreate
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Blog creation locally with title, handle, template suffix, and comment policy, then updates downstream blog/blogs/blogsCount reads without upstream writes.

name: blogUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Blog scalar updates locally and keeps nested article/catalog/count reads coherent.

name: blogDelete
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Blog deletion locally so detail reads return null and blog catalog/count reads omit the deleted blog.

name: page
supportNotes: HAR-303: snapshot/local Page detail reads return staged or hydrated records and null for missing IDs.

name: pages
supportNotes: HAR-303: supports snapshot/local Page catalog reads, empty connections, simple filtering, sort/reverse, cursor windows, and staged lifecycle visibility.

name: pagesCount
supportNotes: HAR-303: returns an EXACT Count from the effective local page graph.

name: pageCreate
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Page creation locally with handle/body/publication/template fields and downstream page/pages/pagesCount visibility.

name: pageUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Page scalar updates locally and keeps downstream reads coherent.

name: pageDelete
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Page tombstones locally so detail reads return null and page catalog/count reads omit deleted pages.

name: comment
supportNotes: HAR-303: snapshot/local Comment detail reads return staged or hydrated records and null for missing local IDs; live Shopify returned an internal error for an unknown comment ID during capture and that quirk is documented rather than emulated.

name: comments
supportNotes: HAR-303: supports snapshot/local Comment catalog reads, empty connections, simple filtering, sort/reverse, cursor windows, and staged moderation/delete visibility.

name: commentApprove
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages comment approval locally for hydrated/snapshot comments, setting the local status to PUBLISHED and updating downstream comment reads without upstream writes.

name: commentSpam
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages comment spam classification locally for hydrated/snapshot comments, setting the local status to SPAM.

name: commentNotSpam
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages not-spam moderation locally for hydrated/snapshot comments, returning the comment to a pending local status.

name: commentDelete
supportNotes: HAR-303: stages Comment tombstones locally so detail reads return null and comment/article comment catalogs omit the deleted comment.

name: menu
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured menu null/detail behavior, menu-item tree shape, and a local online-store navigation overlay model before support.

name: menus
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured menu catalog pagination/filtering and empty-store behavior before overlay-read support.

name: theme
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured theme detail/null behavior, role/state fields, and a local theme asset model before support.

name: themes
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured theme catalog pagination, main/unpublished roles, and empty-store behavior before overlay-read support.

name: scriptTag
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured script tag detail/null behavior and a local storefront script model before support.

name: scriptTags
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured script tag catalog pagination/filtering and empty-store behavior before overlay-read support.

name: webPixel
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured pixel detail/null behavior and a local pixel configuration model before support.

name: serverPixel
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured server pixel detail/null behavior, app-scope constraints, and a local pixel configuration model before support.

name: mobilePlatformApplication
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured mobile platform application detail/null behavior and a local integration settings model before support.

name: mobilePlatformApplications
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store read gap. Requires captured mobile platform application catalog pagination and empty-store behavior before overlay-read support.

name: menuCreate
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store mutation gap. Future support must stage menus and downstream menu/menu catalog reads locally while preserving the original raw mutation for commit replay.

name: menuUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store mutation gap. Future support must stage menu updates, validation branches, and read-after-write effects locally without runtime Shopify writes.

name: menuDelete
supportNotes: HAR-304 online-store mutation gap. Future support must stage menu deletion/tombstones and downstream empty/null reads locally before this root is supported.

name: themeCreate
supportNotes: HAR-304 theme mutation gap. Theme creation is externally visible; keep unsupported until a local theme model, validation capture, and downstream read behavior exist.

name: themeUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-304 theme mutation gap. Future support must stage theme metadata changes locally and overlay theme/themes reads without runtime Shopify writes.

name: themeDelete
supportNotes: HAR-304 theme mutation gap. Future support must model deletion safety, validation errors, and downstream null/catalog effects locally before support.

name: themePublish
supportNotes: HAR-304 theme publish gap. Publishing changes storefront presentation and must remain unsupported until explicit local staging safety and conformance evidence exist.

name: themeFilesCopy
supportNotes: HAR-304 theme file mutation gap. Future support must model local theme asset copies, userErrors, and downstream file reads before this root is supported.

name: themeFilesUpsert
supportNotes: HAR-304 theme file mutation gap. Future support must stage local theme asset writes and preserve raw mutation replay order without runtime Shopify writes.

name: themeFilesDelete
supportNotes: HAR-304 theme file mutation gap. Future support must stage asset deletion/tombstones and downstream read effects locally before support.

name: scriptTagCreate
supportNotes: HAR-304 script tag mutation gap. Script tags alter storefront script execution; keep unsupported until local staging and downstream scriptTag/scriptTags reads are modeled.

name: scriptTagUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-304 script tag mutation gap. Future support must stage updates and validation branches locally before this root is supported.

name: scriptTagDelete
supportNotes: HAR-304 script tag mutation gap. Future support must stage deletion and downstream catalog/detail effects locally before support.

name: webPixelCreate
supportNotes: HAR-304 web pixel mutation gap. Pixel creation has externally visible tracking side effects; keep unsupported until local staging safety and read-after-write evidence exist.

name: webPixelUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-304 web pixel mutation gap. Future support must stage configuration updates locally and overlay webPixel reads without runtime Shopify writes.

name: webPixelDelete
supportNotes: HAR-304 web pixel mutation gap. Future support must stage deletion and downstream null behavior locally before support.

name: serverPixelCreate
supportNotes: HAR-304 server pixel mutation gap. Pixel creation has externally visible tracking side effects; keep unsupported until local staging safety and conformance evidence exist.

name: serverPixelDelete
supportNotes: HAR-304 server pixel mutation gap. Future support must stage deletion and downstream null behavior locally before support.

name: eventBridgeServerPixelUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-304 server pixel integration gap. EventBridge updates must remain unsupported until the proxy can model app-specific server pixel configuration and side effects locally.

name: pubSubServerPixelUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-304 server pixel integration gap. Pub/Sub updates must remain unsupported until local server pixel configuration staging and read-after-write effects are modeled.

name: storefrontAccessTokenCreate
supportNotes: HAR-304 storefront token mutation gap. Token creation has credential side effects; keep unsupported until explicit safety, validation capture, and local commit replay semantics exist.

name: storefrontAccessTokenDelete
supportNotes: HAR-304 storefront token mutation gap. Token deletion has credential side effects; keep unsupported until local token lifecycle modeling and downstream evidence exist.

name: mobilePlatformApplicationCreate
supportNotes: HAR-304 mobile platform application mutation gap. Future support must stage app integration settings locally and preserve raw commit replay order before support.

name: mobilePlatformApplicationUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-304 mobile platform application mutation gap. Future support must stage updates and downstream reads locally without runtime Shopify writes.

name: mobilePlatformApplicationDelete
supportNotes: HAR-304 mobile platform application mutation gap. Future support must stage deletion and downstream null/catalog behavior locally before support.

name: privacySettings
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy read coverage. Keep unimplemented until captured privacySettings evidence and a local privacy settings overlay model exist.

name: consentPolicy
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy read coverage. Keep unimplemented until captured consentPolicy evidence and a local consent policy overlay model exist.

name: consentPolicyRegions
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy read coverage. Keep unimplemented until captured consentPolicyRegions evidence and a local consent policy region model exist.

name: consentPolicyUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy mutation coverage. Keep unimplemented until live capture and a local consent policy staging model exist; registry presence must not make this a supported passthrough.

name: privacyFeaturesDisable
supportNotes: HAR-250 registry-only privacy mutation coverage. Keep unimplemented until live capture and a local privacy feature staging model exist; registry presence must not make this a supported passthrough.

name: dataSaleOptOut
supportNotes: HAR-255: stages customer email data-sale opt-out locally without runtime Shopify writes, returns customerId/userErrors, creates a local opted-out customer for unknown valid emails, and overlays downstream Customer.dataSaleOptOut reads.

name: bulkOperation
supportNotes: HAR-261 root-level Bulk Operations API read gap. Requires a local BulkOperation job model for query exports and mutation imports, missing-id/null behavior, and status/result fields before overlay-read support; this is separate from product variant, inventory, discount, and metaobject bulk roots.

name: bulkOperations
supportNotes: HAR-261 root-level Bulk Operations API catalog read gap. Requires captured pagination, filtering by id/status/operation_type, CREATED_AT sorting, empty connection behavior, and app-scoped job visibility before overlay-read support.

name: currentBulkOperation
supportNotes: HAR-261 deprecated root-level Bulk Operations read gap. Keep unimplemented until the proxy can derive the most recent query or mutation BulkOperation from local job state; current Shopify docs point new callers to bulkOperations with a status filter.

name: bulkOperationRunQuery
supportNotes: HAR-261 root-level Bulk Operations export mutation gap. Future support must stage a local asynchronous query-export job, preserve the original raw mutation for commit, and emulate payload/userErrors/status/read-after-write effects without sending supported runtime requests to Shopify.

name: bulkOperationRunMutation
supportNotes: HAR-261 root-level Bulk Operations import mutation gap. Future support must stage a local asynchronous mutation-import job from stagedUploadPath/clientIdentifier inputs, model BulkOperation results and failures, and avoid runtime Shopify writes until explicit commit replay.

name: bulkOperationCancel
supportNotes: HAR-261 root-level Bulk Operations cancellation gap. Future support must stage canceling/canceled transitions against local BulkOperation jobs and downstream reads without treating this declared root as a permanent passthrough capability.

name: productOptionsReorder
supportNotes: Live schema introspection confirms `productOptionsReorder(productId: ID!, options: [OptionReorderInput!]!)` returns `product` plus `userErrors`. Keep unimplemented until option/value reorder semantics and the resulting variant order recalculation are backed by conformance evidence; registry presence must not make this a supported passthrough.

name: productVariantsBulkReorder
supportNotes: Local staging reorders the effective product variant list by `ProductVariantPositionInput.position` and exposes the new order through product variant connections without runtime Shopify writes.

name: productReorderMedia
supportNotes: Local staging applies `MoveInput` media moves to the effective product media order, returns an async-style `Job`, and exposes the reordered media/image connections without runtime Shopify writes.

name: metafieldDefinition
supportNotes: Product-owner definition detail reads are modeled locally from normalized metafield definition state and product-owned metafields.

name: metafieldDefinitions
supportNotes: Product-owner definition catalogs are modeled locally with owner type, namespace, key, pinned, constraint, query, sort, and pagination filters.

name: standardMetafieldDefinitionTemplates
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 standard template catalog root used before standardMetafieldDefinitionEnable. Registry-only declared gap until template catalog capture and modeling exist.

name: metafieldDefinitionCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Do not proxy as supported until metafield-definition state, validation, and affected value migration semantics are modeled.

name: metafieldDefinitionUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires immutable identity checks and validation job semantics before support.

name: metafieldDefinitionDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires deleteAllAssociatedMetafields behavior and asynchronous associated-value deletion semantics before support.

name: metafieldDefinitionPin
supportNotes: Locally stages product-owner definition pinning for existing normalized definitions. Pin assigns the next owner-type pinned position; downstream definition detail and catalog reads reflect pinnedStatus and PINNED_POSITION ordering without runtime Shopify writes.

name: metafieldDefinitionUnpin
supportNotes: Locally stages product-owner definition unpinning for existing normalized definitions. Unpin clears the definition pinned position and compacts higher owner-type positions so downstream pinned catalogs remain Shopify-like.

name: standardMetafieldDefinitionEnable
supportNotes: Local staging support for fixture-backed standard template IDs/namespaces captured by HAR-257. Successful calls create normalized metafield definition records locally and downstream definition reads observe them without runtime Shopify writes.

name: metaobject
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 entry read root. Registry-only declared gap until live capture proves ID lookup nullability, selected field shape, capabilities, references, and empty/no-data behavior.

name: metaobjectByHandle
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 handle lookup root. Registry-only declared gap until type-plus-handle identity, missing-handle nullability, and app-owned type behavior are captured.

name: metaobjects
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 entry connection root. Registry-only declared gap until type-scoped empty connections, pagination, search filters, sorting, and field-value query semantics are captured.

name: metaobjectDefinition
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 definition read root. HAR-241 supports snapshot and live-hybrid overlay reads from normalized fixture/local state, including ID lookup nullability, captured field ordering, capabilities, access settings, and no-data behavior.

name: metaobjectDefinitionByType
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 definition type lookup root. HAR-241 supports snapshot and live-hybrid overlay reads from normalized fixture/local state, including type identity and missing-type nullability.

name: metaobjectDefinitions
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 definition catalog root. HAR-241 supports snapshot and live-hybrid overlay reads from normalized fixture/local state, including definition pagination, reverse ordering, standard-template metadata, and empty connection behavior.

name: metaobjectCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until field validation, handle generation, capabilities, and downstream read visibility are modeled.

name: metaobjectUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until field patching, validation, capability changes, and read-after-write behavior are modeled.

name: metaobjectUpsert
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until create-vs-update identity, handle conflicts, and downstream catalog behavior are modeled.

name: metaobjectDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until delete payloads, unknown IDs, references, and downstream absence behavior are modeled.

name: metaobjectBulkDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until bulk selection, partial failures, async job shape, and downstream absence behavior are modeled.

name: metaobjectDefinitionCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until definition schema validation, capabilities, access, and entry catalog side effects are modeled.

name: metaobjectDefinitionUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until field definition migrations, validation jobs, access changes, and downstream entry effects are modeled.

name: metaobjectDefinitionDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until associated entry deletion, unknown-type behavior, and downstream definition absence are modeled.

name: standardMetaobjectDefinitionEnable
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Known unsupported root must not be treated as supported passthrough until standard template catalog capture, enable validation, and created-definition semantics are modeled.

name: customerPaymentMethodCreateFromDuplicationData
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future local staging requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and must avoid creating reusable vaulted payment data without an isolated test customer/payment method lifecycle; duplication data must be treated as sensitive ephemeral payment material.

name: customerPaymentMethodCreditCardCreate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future local staging requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and PCI-sensitive card session inputs; capture must use safe non-real payment data and record read-after-write behavior before support.

name: customerPaymentMethodCreditCardUpdate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future local staging requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and an isolated vaulted payment method; capture must avoid real card data and document revoked/updated read-after-write behavior.

name: customerPaymentMethodGetDuplicationData
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future capture requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and must treat returned duplication data as sensitive ephemeral payment material.

name: customerPaymentMethodGetUpdateUrl
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future capture requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and must treat returned update URLs as sensitive, expiring customer-payment links that should not be generated or emailed by the proxy.

name: customerPaymentMethodPaypalBillingAgreementCreate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future local staging requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and isolated PayPal billing-agreement test data before support.

name: customerPaymentMethodPaypalBillingAgreementUpdate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future local staging requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and an isolated PayPal billing-agreement test method before support.

name: customerPaymentMethodRemoteCreate
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future local staging requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods, safe remote gateway identifiers, and polling/asynchronous status evidence through customerPaymentMethod before support.

name: customerPaymentMethodRevoke
supportNotes: Customer payment method scaffold only. Future local staging requires write_customers plus write_customer_payment_methods and an isolated payment method because revoke is destructive for recurring billing flows; unsupported runtime passthrough must stay visible in logs.

name: orderCapture
supportNotes: Stages captured order authorizations locally into CAPTURE transactions, updates downstream financial/capturable fields, and avoids live capture side effects at runtime.

name: orderCreateMandatePayment
supportNotes: Stages mandate-payment jobs locally with session idempotency keys, synthetic paymentReferenceId values, and downstream order transaction/financial-status updates without contacting payment gateways.

name: paymentCustomizationActivation
supportNotes: Payment customization activation is staged locally against normalized payment customization records. Unknown ids mirror captured PAYMENT_CUSTOMIZATION_NOT_FOUND userErrors; existing records update enabled without invoking Shopify Functions or checkout payment behavior, and duplicate ids are handled idempotently.

name: paymentCustomizationCreate
supportNotes: Payment customization create stages a normalized record locally with selected metafields, stable synthetic ids, current functionHandle input support, deprecated functionId input support, and downstream detail/catalog visibility. Captured missing required fields plus Function/metafield validation branches are handled locally without runtime Shopify writes.

name: paymentCustomizationDelete
supportNotes: Payment customization delete marks normalized records deleted locally. Unknown ids mirror captured PAYMENT_CUSTOMIZATION_NOT_FOUND userErrors, and downstream reads return Shopify-like null/empty structures.

name: paymentCustomizationUpdate
supportNotes: Payment customization update stages local scalar/metafield changes over normalized records, including current functionHandle and deprecated functionId identifier changes. Unknown ids and captured Function/metafield validation branches return Shopify-like PaymentCustomizationError payloads without proxying runtime writes upstream.

name: paymentReminderSend
supportNotes: Payment reminder scaffold only. Future capture requires write_orders and a no-recipient or otherwise safe email plan because the happy path sends a customer-visible payment reminder.

name: paymentTermsCreate
supportNotes: Payment terms scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_terms plus order or draft-order access and must use an isolated order because it changes due dates/payment schedules.

name: paymentTermsDelete
supportNotes: Payment terms scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_terms plus order or draft-order access and disposable terms because delete changes payment schedules.

name: paymentTermsUpdate
supportNotes: Payment terms scaffold only. Future capture requires write_payment_terms plus order or draft-order access and an isolated payment schedule because updates change due dates/payment status.

name: shopifyPaymentsPayoutAlternateCurrencyCreate
supportNotes: Shopify Payments payout scaffold only. Future capture requires Shopify Payments payout/account access and must not run happy paths on shared stores because it can alter real payout configuration or money movement.

name: transactionVoid
supportNotes: Stages voids for uncaptured local authorization transactions and updates downstream capturable/financial fields without proxying the supported mutation upstream.

name: fulfillment
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 Fulfillment read root. Snapshot reads resolve from fulfillment records already present on the local order graph, return null for missing IDs, and keep top-level detail/event serialization aligned with nested Order.fulfillments.

name: fulfillmentEventCreate
supportNotes: Locally stages events against order-backed fulfillments, exposes them through Fulfillment.events and nested Order.fulfillments, and updates captured shipment milestone fields without proxying the supported mutation upstream.

name: assignedFulfillmentOrders
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 fulfillment-order assignment catalog root. Snapshot support is intentionally limited to Shopify-like empty connections for local data with no fulfillment-service assignment model; captured live evidence records the current credential blocker when the app is not associated with a fulfillment service.

name: fulfillmentOrder
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 FulfillmentOrder ID lookup root. Snapshot reads resolve from fulfillment-order records already present on the local order graph, return null for missing IDs, and keep detail serialization aligned with nested Order.fulfillmentOrders. Stored fixture deliveryMethod data is serialized when present and returns null when absent; holds and lifecycle replacement semantics remain out of scope.

name: fulfillmentOrders
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 all-fulfillment-orders catalog root. Snapshot support lists fulfillment orders already present on the local order graph, excludes CLOSED rows unless includeClosed is true, supports local ID/status/request_status query terms, ID/status sorting, reverse, and cursor pagination without inventing absent records.

name: manualHoldsFulfillmentOrders
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 held fulfillment-order catalog root. Snapshot support is currently limited to captured no-hold empty connection behavior because the local fulfillment-order model does not yet store hold records or hold-specific filters.

name: fulfillmentOrderAcceptCancellationRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires fulfillment-service cancellation request lifecycle, status/requestStatus transitions, merchant request history, and downstream reads before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderAcceptFulfillmentRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires fulfillment-service acceptance semantics, estimated shipped timestamps, request status transitions, and downstream reads before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderCancel
supportNotes: HAR-234 captured 2026-04 lifecycle support for locally cancelling an open fulfillment order: the original closes with empty line items, a replacement OPEN fulfillment order carries remaining line items, downstream order/top-level reads observe both records, and runtime handling does not proxy upstream.

name: fulfillmentOrderClose
supportNotes: HAR-234 captured the merchant-managed guardrail `The fulfillment order's assigned fulfillment service must be of api type`; this root remains unimplemented for full lifecycle support because no success path was captured for API fulfillment-service orders.

name: fulfillmentOrderHold
supportNotes: HAR-234 captured 2026-04 partial hold support with fulfillmentHold metadata, ON_HOLD status, held line-item quantities, remaining OPEN fulfillment-order creation, manualHoldsFulfillmentOrders visibility, and release read-after-write behavior.

name: fulfillmentOrderLineItemsPreparedForPickup
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires pickup-specific fulfillment-order line-item states, notification semantics, and downstream deliveryMethod/status visibility before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderMerge
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires merge eligibility, line-item aggregation, replacement/closed order identity behavior, and downstream fulfillmentOrdersForMerge parity before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderMove
supportNotes: HAR-234 captured 2026-04 partial move support with moved/original/remaining fulfillment-order payloads, assigned-location changes, line-item quantity splitting, and downstream order/top-level reads.

name: fulfillmentOrderOpen
supportNotes: HAR-234 captured 2026-04 MARK_AS_OPEN behavior after report-progress state: local staging returns OPEN status and restores open supported actions for downstream reads.

name: fulfillmentOrderRejectCancellationRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires cancellation request rejection lifecycle, merchant request records, and post-rejection fulfillment-order status behavior before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderRejectFulfillmentRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires rejection reasons, rejected line-item semantics, merchant request records, and unfulfillable-line behavior before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderReleaseHold
supportNotes: HAR-234 captured 2026-04 release-hold support for app-created holds: local staging clears fulfillmentHolds, restores OPEN status/actions, and updates manualHoldsFulfillmentOrders/downstream fulfillment-order reads.

name: fulfillmentOrderReportProgress
supportNotes: HAR-234 captured 2026-04 report-progress support for OPEN merchant-managed fulfillment orders: local staging moves status to IN_PROGRESS and exposes MARK_AS_OPEN in downstream reads.

name: fulfillmentOrderReschedule
supportNotes: HAR-234 captured the open-order guardrail `Fulfillment order must be scheduled.`; this root remains unimplemented for full lifecycle support until scheduled fulfillment-order setup and success read-after-write behavior are captured.

name: fulfillmentOrdersReroute
supportNotes: HAR-234 captured unknown-id RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND and a live included-location branch returning Shopify INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR for the current disposable setup; this root remains unimplemented until a successful reroute scenario is captured.

name: fulfillmentOrdersSetFulfillmentDeadline
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires fulfillBy/deadline mutation semantics and downstream fulfillment-order deadline reads before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderSplit
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires quantity-based line-item splitting, remaining fulfillment-order identity, and downstream line item totals before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderSubmitCancellationRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires cancellation request creation, merchant request history, notification semantics, and requestStatus transitions before support.

name: fulfillmentOrderSubmitFulfillmentRequest
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires full and partial fulfillment request semantics, split-on-partial behavior, notifyCustomer handling, and requestStatus transitions before support.

name: fulfillmentService
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 FulfillmentService ID lookup root. Snapshot reads resolve from the local fulfillment-service graph and return null for missing IDs; `Shop.fulfillmentServices` remains a nested shop field rather than a top-level list root.

name: fulfillmentServiceCreate
supportNotes: Locally stages third-party fulfillment-service creation with associated fulfillment-service location visibility, callback URL persistence, inventory/tracking flags, and raw mutation log retention. External callback, inventory, tracking, and fulfillment-order notification endpoints are not invoked.

name: fulfillmentServiceDelete
supportNotes: Locally stages fulfillment-service deletion, including missing-id userErrors and associated location side effects for DELETE/TRANSFER versus KEEP inventory actions. Inventory movement itself remains in-memory only and no external endpoints are invoked.

name: fulfillmentServiceUpdate
supportNotes: Locally stages name, callback URL, tracking, inventory-management, and requires-shipping-method updates. The service handle remains stable while the associated fulfillment-service location name follows the service name.

name: availableCarrierServices
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL carrier-service availability root. Registry-only declared gap until active carrier service/location pairing and empty-list behavior are captured.

name: carrierService
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 DeliveryCarrierService ID lookup root. Snapshot reads resolve from the local carrier-service graph and return null for missing IDs; staged create/update/delete effects are visible without invoking callback URLs.

name: carrierServices
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 DeliveryCarrierService connection root. Local support covers empty/no-data behavior, active/id query filters, ID/created/updated sorting, reverse ordering, and cursor pagination for snapshot plus staged carrier services.

name: carrierServiceCreate
supportNotes: Locally stages DeliveryCarrierService creation with name, callback URL, active status, and service-discovery flags. The original raw mutation is retained for commit replay and callback/service-discovery endpoints are not invoked at runtime.

name: carrierServiceDelete
supportNotes: Locally stages DeliveryCarrierService deletion with captured unknown-id userError behavior and downstream catalog/detail absence. Delete root presence was verified against Admin GraphQL 2026-04 before enabling support.

name: carrierServiceUpdate
supportNotes: Locally stages DeliveryCarrierService updates for name, callback URL, active status, and service-discovery flags. Unknown IDs mirror the captured app ownership/not-found userError and downstream reads observe the staged values.

name: deliveryProfile
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 DeliveryProfile ID lookup root is fixture-backed in snapshot mode for captured scalar fields, nested location groups, zones, method definitions, product/variant assignments, unassigned locations, and missing-profile nullability. Delivery-profile writes remain unsupported until local staging models asynchronous removal jobs and nested validation behavior.

name: deliveryProfiles
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 DeliveryProfile catalog root is fixture-backed in snapshot mode for first/last cursor windows, reverse ordering, merchantOwnedOnly filtering, and empty/no-data connection behavior. The local model does not invent delivery profiles when normalized fixtures are absent.

name: locationsAvailableForDeliveryProfilesConnection
supportNotes: Delivery-profile origin-location helper root. Registry-only declared gap until active origin location eligibility, pickup/local-delivery/shipping-rate configuration, and cursor behavior are captured.

name: deliveryProfileCreate
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 deliveryProfileCreate stages locally for merchant-owned custom profiles, name validation, nested location groups/zones/static rate definitions, weight/price condition creation, variant association, downstream delivery profile reads, and meta log/state inspection. Carrier participants, selling-plan lifecycle semantics, and full delivery-setting eligibility validation remain outside the supported subset.

name: deliveryProfileRemove
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 deliveryProfileRemove stages locally for custom-profile removal, Shopify-like asynchronous Job payloads, missing-profile userErrors, default-profile denial, and downstream profile/catalog absence. Removal is immediate in local staged reads while commit replay retains the original mutation order for Shopify's asynchronous runtime behavior.

name: deliveryProfileUpdate
supportNotes: Admin GraphQL 2026-04 deliveryProfileUpdate stages locally for profile rename, nested location add/remove, location-group create/update/delete, zone create/update/delete, static rate method create/update/delete, condition update/delete, variant association/dissociation, and downstream profile reads. Legacy-mode transitions, carrier participant callbacks, and full selling-plan routing remain excluded until separately captured.

name: orderEditAddShippingLine
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Order edit support exists for variant quantity changes, but shipping-line edit roots need captured calculated-order shippingLine/totals behavior before support.

name: orderEditRemoveShippingLine
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires captured calculated-order removal semantics, total recalculation, and downstream order shippingLines visibility before support.

name: orderEditUpdateShippingLine
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires captured calculated-order update semantics, tax/discount interactions, total recalculation, and downstream order shippingLines visibility before support.

name: discountCodeBasicCreate
supportNotes: HAR-193 stages native code-basic create locally with downstream discount reads and commit replay ID mapping. BXGY, free-shipping, automatic, and app-discount writes remain outside this support slice.

name: discountCodeBasicUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-193 stages native code-basic updates locally for existing local discount records and preserves captured unknown-id DiscountUserError behavior.

name: discountCodeBxgyCreate
supportNotes: HAR-195 stages native code BXGY create locally with product, variant, and collection references, read-after-write discount detail/catalog visibility, and captured validation guardrails. This models Admin GraphQL visibility only and does not claim checkout price-calculation behavior.

name: discountCodeBxgyUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-195 stages native code BXGY updates for existing local BXGY code discounts and preserves downstream reads. Shared code activate/deactivate/delete roots apply to staged BXGY code discounts through the normalized discount state.

name: discountCodeBulkActivate
supportNotes: HAR-197 keeps the broad code-bulk status root unimplemented. Blank/all-discount destructive selectors are refused locally; other unsupported selectors remain visible through unsupported mutation passthrough observability until full bulk lifecycle staging exists.

name: discountCodeBulkDeactivate
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures selector-conflict validation guardrails only. HAR-197 additionally refuses blank/all-discount destructive selectors locally. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountCodeBulkDelete
supportNotes: HAR-197 keeps the broad code-bulk delete root unimplemented. Blank/all-discount destructive selectors are refused locally; other unsupported selectors remain visible through unsupported mutation passthrough observability until full bulk lifecycle staging exists.

name: discountRedeemCodeBulkAdd
supportNotes: HAR-197 locally stages safe explicit-code add branches and records completed bulk-creation state, but keeps the root unimplemented until full async job lifecycle and conformance-backed failure semantics are modeled.

name: discountCodeRedeemCodeBulkDelete
supportNotes: HAR-197 locally stages safe id-scoped delete branches and records completed job state, but keeps the root unimplemented until search/saved-search selectors, async lifecycle, and conformance-backed failure semantics are modeled.

name: discountAutomaticBxgyCreate
supportNotes: HAR-195 stages native automatic BXGY create locally with product, variant, and collection references, read-after-write discount detail/catalog visibility, and captured validation guardrails. This models Admin GraphQL visibility only and does not claim checkout price-calculation behavior.

name: discountAutomaticBxgyUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-195 stages native automatic BXGY updates for existing local BXGY automatic discounts and preserves downstream reads. Shared automatic activate/deactivate/delete roots apply to staged BXGY automatic discounts through the normalized discount state.

name: discountAutomaticBulkDelete
supportNotes: HAR-198 captures selector-conflict validation guardrails only. HAR-197 additionally refuses blank/all-discount destructive selectors locally. Keep unimplemented until full local discount lifecycle staging and read-after-write emulation exist.

name: discountCodeAppCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountCodeAppUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountAutomaticAppCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: discountAutomaticAppUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only app-managed discount safety gap. Unsupported runtime requests still use the generic passthrough escape hatch, which would hit Shopify, because Shopify Functions app-discount staging requires captured appDiscountType/functionId fixtures and a local model that does not execute external Function logic.

name: marketingActivities
supportNotes: Snapshot/local read support for captured selected fields, empty connections, filtering, sorting, reverse ordering, and cursor/pageInfo shapes. No marketing mutation staging is included.

name: marketingActivity
supportNotes: Snapshot/local singular lookup support for captured selected fields. Missing IDs return null; no arbitrary marketing activity records are synthesized.

name: marketingEvent
supportNotes: Snapshot/local singular lookup support for captured selected fields. Missing IDs return null; no arbitrary marketing event records are synthesized.

name: marketingEvents
supportNotes: Snapshot/local read support for captured selected fields, empty connections, filtering, sorting, reverse ordering, and cursor/pageInfo shapes. No marketing mutation staging is included.

name: marketingActivityCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for payload, validation, status transitions, and downstream read visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpdate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for update payloads, userErrors, and downstream activity/event reads.

name: marketingActivityCreateExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for external remoteId/UTM fields, userErrors, and downstream list/detail visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpdateExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for external activity identity, status updates, and downstream list/detail visibility.

name: marketingActivityUpsertExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for create-vs-update behavior, remoteId identity, and downstream list/detail visibility.

name: marketingActivityDeleteExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for deletion payloads, unknown IDs, and downstream absence behavior.

name: marketingActivitiesDeleteAllExternal
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for asynchronous job payloads and blocked create/update behavior while deletion is pending.

name: marketingEngagementCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for activity-level and channel-level engagement metrics and report visibility.

name: marketingEngagementsDelete
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_marketing_events captures for channel-level deletion semantics and userErrors.

name: webhookSubscription
supportNotes: Local snapshot/live-hybrid reads are modeled for API-created webhook subscription records in normalized state. Unknown IDs return null. Create/update/delete staging remains unsupported until a local mutation lifecycle model exists.

name: webhookSubscriptions
supportNotes: Local snapshot/live-hybrid catalog reads are modeled for API-created webhook subscriptions with normalized nodes, edges, pageInfo, stable synthetic cursors, ID sorting, reverse ordering, pagination, and simple captured query filtering. App TOML webhooks remain out of scope.

name: webhookSubscriptionsCount
supportNotes: Local snapshot/live-hybrid count reads are synthesized from normalized API-created webhook subscription state with Shopify-like count/precision fields and limit-aware AT_LEAST precision.

name: webhookSubscriptionCreate
supportNotes: Local staging is supported for the HAR-267 captured Admin API-created HTTP URI registration subset, including topic, format, includeFields, metafieldNamespaces, filter, endpoint callbackUrl projection, missing URI userErrors, mutation-log retention, and downstream detail/catalog/count read-after-write visibility. App TOML webhook config and webhook delivery remain out of scope.

name: webhookSubscriptionUpdate
supportNotes: Local staging updates staged or hydrated webhook subscriptions for the HAR-267 captured Admin API-created HTTP URI subset, including format, includeFields, metafieldNamespaces, filter, endpoint callbackUrl projection, unknown-id userErrors, mutation-log retention, and downstream detail/catalog/count read-after-write visibility without runtime Shopify writes.

name: webhookSubscriptionDelete
supportNotes: Local staging deregisters staged or hydrated API-created webhook subscriptions for the HAR-267 captured subset, returning deletedWebhookSubscriptionId/userErrors payloads, preserving raw mutation-log replay order, and making downstream detail/catalog/count reads observe deletion without runtime Shopify writes. Unknown or already deleted IDs return the captured Webhook subscription does not exist userError; missing/null ID branches return Shopify-like GraphQL validation errors locally.

name: segment
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured read_customers segment detail baseline. Snapshot mode serves captured selected fields locally and returns Shopify-like null plus NOT_FOUND for unknown segment IDs.

name: segments
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured catalog baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured cursor/pageInfo payloads when hydrated and otherwise returns an empty connection; broader search/sort grammar remains unsupported until captured.

name: segmentsCount
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured count precision baseline. Snapshot mode returns captured count/precision when hydrated and EXACT zero for empty local state.

name: segmentFilters
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured filter metadata baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured selected filter fields or returns an empty connection when no metadata has been hydrated.

name: segmentFilterSuggestions
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured filter suggestion baseline for a search argument. Snapshot mode preserves captured suggestion payloads or returns an empty connection; uncaptured search grammar remains unsupported.

name: segmentValueSuggestions
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured value suggestion baseline for customer_tags. Snapshot mode preserves captured suggestion payloads or returns an empty connection; uncaptured filters remain unsupported.

name: segmentMigrations
supportNotes: HAR-215 captured migration catalog baseline. Snapshot mode preserves captured migration connection shape or returns an empty connection.

name: customerSegmentMembers
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Requires read_customers and unrestricted/protected-customer-data capture for member pagination, statistics, and empty membership behavior.

name: customerSegmentMembersQuery
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Requires read_customers and unrestricted/protected-customer-data capture for asynchronous query job shape and missing-job behavior.

name: customerSegmentMembership
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap. Requires read_customers and unrestricted/protected-customer-data capture for membership boolean maps, unknown segment IDs, and empty responses.

name: customerSegmentMembersQueryCreate
supportNotes: Registry-only declared gap for future local staging. Requires write_customers and protected-customer-data captures for asynchronous job identity, validation, and downstream query reads.

name: segmentCreate
supportNotes: HAR-216 stages segment creation locally with synthetic IDs/timestamps, captured blank/invalid-query validation, Shopify-like duplicate-name suffixing, and downstream segment catalog/count/detail reads.

name: segmentUpdate
supportNotes: HAR-216 stages segment updates locally with captured unknown-ID/validation userErrors, query/name replacement, duplicate-name suffixing, and read-after-write visibility.

name: segmentDelete
supportNotes: HAR-216 stages segment deletion locally, returns captured unknown-ID userErrors, and removes deleted segments from downstream detail/catalog/count reads.

name: priceListCreate
supportNotes: Stages local price-list lifecycle state for Markets reads. Validation is conservative and fixture gaps are documented in docs/endpoints/markets.md.

name: priceListUpdate
supportNotes: Stages local name, currency, parent adjustment, catalog link, and fixed-price reset-on-currency-change behavior for PriceList records.

name: priceListFixedPricesByProductUpdate
supportNotes: Stages product-scoped fixed-price upserts/deletes only for variants visible in normalized product state.

name: marketLocalizableResource
supportNotes: Supports product metafield-backed MarketLocalizableResource reads for the current 2026-04 METAFIELD resource type.

name: marketLocalizableResources
supportNotes: Supports resourceType: METAFIELD over product metafields; METAOBJECT returns the Shopify-like empty local slice until metaobject state exists.

name: marketLocalizableResourcesByIds
supportNotes: Supports product metafield resource IDs and ignores unknown IDs with Shopify-like empty connection behavior.

name: marketLocalizationsRegister
supportNotes: Stages market-specific values for product metafield resources only; validates market ID, key, digest, blank value, and missing input without upstream writes.

name: marketLocalizationsRemove
supportNotes: Removes staged market-specific product metafield values locally and returns removed localization payloads.
